TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_khuw, title = khuw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/khuw} }

S.FORM: khuw ssyan na trakis pagay bsinu ixiy.
khuw ssyan na trakis pagay bsinu ixiy.
S.PHON: kħuw s~ɕs~ɕjan na trakis~ɕ paɣaj βs~ɕinu ixij.
